accurate.why: All figures ($159M, $3.01B, $5.714B, $20.338B, $8.39B, $7.132B Defense Env Cleanup, $955M NRC, $23M, $33M Bay-Delta) verified against text; NGA/FERC, restrictions all correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated provisions; CRT/Wuhan/equity bans and LNG/FERC amendment all present.

states_purpose.why: States FY2025 energy/water appropriations, five titles.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes Natural Gas Act amendment and drought/water authorization extensions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Captures key fund restrictions and Indian/Bay-Delta carve-outs.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all five titles with representative figures and policy riders.

concise.why: Dense but appropriate for a large bill.

correct_entities.why: Corps, Reclamation, DOE, NNSA, FERC, NRC all correct.

correct_figures.why: Every stated dollar figure matches the bill text.
